hot_topics.topic: Log file disk space explosion (dual reports)
hot_topics.note: Two separate reports still open: 17GB+ (#16142, hardcoded Windows path) and 26GB+ (#15947, HTTP 418 retry loop against gitcode WAF). Both multi-day with no fix merged yet.
29 sessions hard-deleted via internal API (soft:false). No recovery path. Open since 2026-06-16.

community_sentiment.observation: Open issues dropped slightly (-3: 944→941). 59 new issues in the last 7 days shows high user activity. Three CRITICAL bugs (disk exhaustion ×2, data loss) remain open with no fix merged. Dev velocity is high: 142 PRs merged to main in 30 days, 63 in the last 7 days alone.
